I can do that — quick note before I schedule: 10:00–11:00 on 2024-05-19 is already taken by "Project Kick-off", and 11:00–11:30 is taken by your one‑on‑one. So 10:00 itself isn’t available.

1) Which time do you want instead? (pick one)
   - 09:00–10:00 (available)
   - 11:30–12:30 (available)

2) Who should be invited? (list email addresses; if you don’t list anyone, I’ll create it with you as the only participant)

3) Location or meeting link? (e.g., Office 44A, Teams/Zoom link, or “None”)

4) Description — I can use this default short description unless you prefer something else:

Tell me your choices and I’ll schedule it.
